text:
All major live sports in the USA will 10x in popularity over the next 10 years. 

Sports is one thing AI won’t touch. 

People want community. People want in person events.

This got 200 likes but over 1000 DMs…

The demand for a practical content/marketing agent is larger than I thought.

RT @godofprompt: The last 2 weeks in AI have been the most absurd stretch in tech history.

I can’t even keep up. And this is literally wha…
